title: Nocase and in clause
description:
### What happens?

Using version 1.1.3 I execute the following statement:

```
SET default_collation = NOCASE;

select *
from (
                select 1 as A, 'Removed' as ds
                union
                Select 2 as A, 'REMOVED' as ds
                ) t
where ds in (
                select 'Removed' as ds -- It does not select the second record even though I set default_collation = NOCASE;
                );             
select *
from (
                select 1 as A, 'Removed' as ds
                union
                Select 2 as A, 'REMOVED' as ds
                ) t
where ds ='Removed'; -- in this case it works correctly
```
This is a simplified scenario, it took me several days to understand this rounding problem in my more complex scenario.

### To Reproduce

```
SET default_collation = NOCASE;

select *
from (
                select 1 as A, 'Removed' as ds
                union
                Select 2 as A, 'REMOVED' as ds
                ) t
where ds in (
                select 'Removed' as ds -- It does not select the second record even though I set default_collation = NOCASE;
                );             
select *
from (
                select 1 as A, 'Removed' as ds
                union
                Select 2 as A, 'REMOVED' as ds
                ) t
where ds ='Removed'; -- in this case it works correctly
```

### OS:

Windows 11 64-bit operating system

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.3

### DuckDB Client:

Cli

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Removed', 10.5), (2, 'REMOVED', 20.5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE lower(name) IN (SELECT lower('Removed') AS name);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE lower(name) = lower('Removed');
key_bug_features: NOCASE collation not working with IN clause
